title: Hermes Agent Desktop + FREE APIs: This is ACTUALLY ONE OF THE BEST AGENT APPS!
summary: Hermes Agent Desktop is a desktop application that provides a visual interface for the Hermes Agent framework, supporting sessions, skills, tools, messaging integrations, cron-based task scheduling, multi-agent workflows, and model provider selection across Anthropic, Ollama, Nous, OpenAI, and OpenRouter.
